name: Resound Credit Union
description_short: Resound Credit Union is a Tennessee-based credit union operating since 1955, offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with competitive rates across Middle Tennessee branches.
description_long:
Resound Credit Union began operations in Nashville in 1955 and has grown to serve members throughout Middle Tennessee with a physical branch network. The organization recently rebranded from Cornerstone Family Credit Union to Resound Credit Union, marking what they describe as "a new era" for the institution. As a credit union, Resound operates on a member-owned cooperative model rather than as a for-profit bank.

Resound offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including personal checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), vehicle loans, personal loans, home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), and Visa Platinum credit cards with rewards and balance transfer options. They advertise competitive rates including vehicle loans as low as 5.25% APR, personal loans from 10.75% APR, home equity loans from 6.25% APR, and CDs with yields up to 3.65% APY. The credit union provides digital banking access through online platforms and a mobile app, along with traditional in-branch and drive-thru services.

Resound distinguishes itself through its regional focus in Middle Tennessee with seven physical branch locations (Nashville, Clarksville, Dickson, Fairview, Franklin, Hendersonville, and Murfreesboro) and access to thousands of ATMs nationwide through CO-OP, CUHere, and MoneyPass networks. The organization recently opened a new Fairview location and is in the process of rebranding signage across all branches. They offer financial wellness resources including best practices for financial health, retirement planning guidance, and partnership with financial advisors.

As a regional credit union, Resound serves a geographically defined membership base primarily in Middle Tennessee. While they offer standard banking products at competitive rates, membership may be restricted to those living or working in their service area, and their branch network is smaller than national banks. The recent rebranding suggests organizational transition that members should monitor for service consistency.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Access to thousands of ATMs nationwide through CO-OP, CUHere, and MoneyPass networks at no fee
Competitive loan rates: vehicle loans from 5.25% APR, personal loans from 10.75% APR, HELOCs from 6.25% APR
Seven physical branch locations throughout Middle Tennessee plus digital banking and mobile app access
Visa Platinum credit card with rewards, low rates, and up to $100 bonus cash on balance transfers
CDs offering up to 3.65% APY for savings goals
Recently opened new Fairview branch location, indicating expansion
Member-owned credit union structure aligned with consumer interests rather than shareholder profits
cons: Membership likely restricted to those living or working in Middle Tennessee service area, limiting accessibility
Recent rebranding from Cornerstone Family Credit Union may cause confusion and service transition issues
Limited branch network (7 locations) compared to regional or national banks
Website content does not specify membership eligibility criteria or initial deposit requirements
No information provided about overdraft fees, minimum balance requirements, or other banking fees
best_for: Middle Tennessee residents and workers seeking a member-owned credit union with local branch presence
Borrowers in the region needing competitive vehicle or home equity loans
Savers looking for higher-yielding CDs and ATM access through nationwide networks
Existing Cornerstone Family Credit Union members transitioning to the Resound Credit Union brand
diagnosis: Resound Credit Union is best for residents and workers in Middle Tennessee seeking traditional banking services from a member-owned institution with local branches and competitive rates. The main caveat is that membership is geographically restricted to the Middle Tennessee service area, and the recent rebranding from Cornerstone Family Credit Union may create transition uncertainties that prospective members should verify directly with the institution.
services: Certificates of deposit (CDs) with rates up to 3.65% APY
Home equity lines of credit (HELOCs) from 6.25% APR
Visa Platinum credit cards with rewards and balance transfer bonuses
Digital banking platform with online account access
ATM access through CO-OP, CUHere, and MoneyPass networks
Financial advisory services and retirement planning
ACH transfers and standard payment processing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
